notes: Adopted 2026-04-06: required_third_lane=0 + min_top_win=0.65. Baseline 30d was -0.85 (12 bets, strict 1-4-6). Trial improved daily ROI from -1.0 to 4.90 (7 bets, 2 hits) and 30d ROI from -0.85 to -0.0623 (284 bets, 14 hits). First adoption of lane relaxation — 3rd lane constraint removed. Monitor for stability in future runs before promoting to permanent config.
